title: centaurea subjacea
intro: Centaurea subjacea, also known as the lesser knapweed, is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea subjacea is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
